name: iaux-donation-form
description: Root tooling for building the GitHub Pages demo site. Packages are installed per-directory via scripts/bootstrap.sh.

scripts.ghpages:build: vite build --config vite.config.ghpages.ts && touch ghpages/.nojekyll && cp packages/form-section/demo/puppy.jpg ghpages/packages/form-section/demo/puppy.jpg
